title: capsella batavorum
intro: Capsella bursa-pastoris, commonly known as Capsella batavorum, is a biennial plant in the Brassicaceae family, also known as shepherd's purse or lady's purse. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. Capsella batavorum is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving blood circulation, and aiding in wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Capsella batavorum typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and seeds, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in creams and ointments.
